name: Dingo Starr
description:
Dingo is busy playing his drums in your shared house, out in the garage. Are you gonna join him or are you gonna tell him off for being noisy?

This was really hard to do because Dingo has such vague history aside from his appearance and voice. His personality is really hard to discern but based off old dialogue I guess its safe to assume he was a wee bit of a jerk (really hard to believe now that we have Dook, who is a sweetie)

Those unaware, Dingo was basically a prototype to Dook back in 1978 before he was changed into Dook in the 1980s. I also find it funny Dingo was so small at only 4ft tall, even just sitting. Dook today is 5'7" when sitting.

sorry for the ramble lol I love talking about these goobers
